allows_dependency_execution.rationale: onboarding may run lockfile-based dependency install only after repo-on-disk detection, explicit consent, D1 guard, and mandatory --ignore-scripts to block postinstall execution.

init may run lockfile-based dependency install only after cloned repo is on disk, AUQ run confirmation selects execution, D1 non-interactive guard applies, and every install command uses --ignore-scripts to block lifecycle scripts.
